query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(publishedToFeed) as published_feed, SUM(publishedModel) as published_model, SUM(CASE WHEN modelRunAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modeled, SUM(CASE WHEN modelTotal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_total, SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_spread FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'NHL';
